programmes.show_description: Action-packed abduction thriller with Bruce Willis. When his fiancée is kidnapped by sex traffickers, a former US Army Ranger and his brothers join forces with a veteran detective to find her (2018).
How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.
Action-packed abduction thriller with Bruce Willis. When his fiancée is kidnapped by sex traffickers, a former US Army Ranger and his brothers join forces with a veteran detective to find her (2018).
A gang robbing the Crown Jewels force Mannering to assist them.
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Western with Jeff Fahey. In Australia's untamed outback, a woman will stop at nothing to save her family's ranch, while two rival suitors will risk everything to win her heart... (1989)
After a gang robs the saloon, the leader kills two of his men and flees Tombstone.
Claibourne witnesses Vic Reel kill a newspaperman from Denver; in his efforts to uncover the motive for the murder, Hollister succeeds in the capture of the Taylor gang.
A Rancher returns from Denver with his young bride and is baited into a gunfight by notorious gunslinger Vince Sanders.

Steed returns from holiday unable to remember anything from the past three weeks. Can Steed be stopped before he carries out his sudden urge to kill 'Mother'?
Steed joins the Jack The Ripper Club to investigate a series of murders. Can he and Tara unearth why the killer is targeting delegates attending an International conference?
Buck, Victoria and Manolito return to Montoya Ranch and become prisoners, with Don Sebastian, of a degraded former Civil War friend of Buck.
Gutsy western starring Lou Diamond Phillips. A decorated soldier returning home after the American Civil War finds that an evil land owner has taken over the town. (2008)

Sheriff Clay Hollister sends for a woman lawyer to settle a dispute between a mine owner and a local businessman.
Hollister investigates a series of mysterious deaths among the silver miners and links them to the town's most respected woman. He must devise a plan to trap her but it'll have risks.
Fernando Lamas guest-stars as Mexican bandit turned revolutionary who captures and prepares to execute the Cannon Ranch hands to prove his power.
Danny finds himself in trouble after a dying parachutist chains him to an attache case containing secret information and something that is sure to create a 'bang'.
Can Steed prove Tara's innocence when evidence emerges of her working as a double agent and passing defence secrets onto suspected enemy agents?
Steed faces a race against time to locate Tara who has seemingly disappeared after visiting an antiques shop. The investigation soon leads him to a former agent.

After killing a Holcomb brother Marshal Vern Fawcett resigns to be with his family. There's no rest though as Hollister sends him to Tucson to deal with the vengeful Holcombs.
After Hollister takes a wounded youth to Tombstone's hospital the notorious Gayleyville gang kidnap him and the nurse aiding him. Hollister and the wounded man attempt to save the nurse.
The Cannons care for a wounded relative who repays them by stealing the ranch payroll.
A ruthless millionaire, Thaddeus Krane, attracts the attention of the Persuaders, and when Brett is abducted Danny has to impersonate Brett to cause confusion.
A vicar asks Steed and Tara for their help to investigate the suspicious deaths of a team of archaeologists excavating a site underneath his church. Is the case linked to a mysterious box?
Mother' visits his two elderly aunts on his birthday and tells them about a historic Avengers case involving an international crime ring and their plan to steal expensive pieces of art.
